title: Mamaearth Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Mamaearth Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Mamaearth Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mamaearth Capital India:
Mamaearth Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth Capital India!
